description: The other half of the scaling guard. $1250 on a 3BR clears the flat 2BR floor ($1190) so a naive check passes it, but it is below the 3BR-scaled floor ($1435) and must flag. Catches a regression that drops bedroom scaling.

simulated_conversation.message: Three bedroom, Rock Hill to Charlotte, no stairs, customer packs their own boxes.
Twelve fifty. We're cheaper than anyone you'll call today.
Twelve fifty for a three bedroom — does that include fuel and materials?
Look, it's twelve fifty to get it done. We'll work the rest out.
